Environmental Role: Fine particles (≤2.5µm); primary winter AQI driver. NAAQS limit: 60µg/m³ (24h).
Ammonia from agricultural sources (fertilisers, livestock); spikes post-harvest in Oct–Nov.
Ground-level ozone peaks in summer; photochemical product of NOx + VOC + sunlight.
Sulphur dioxide from coal combustion; weaker AQI driver in Noida vs mega-industrial zones.
Carbon monoxide from vehicle exhaust and biomass burning; strong AQI co-predictor.
Nitrogen dioxide from traffic and power plants; indicator of urban combustion intensity.
Coarse particles (≤10µm); dominant in summer dust storms and post-monsoon stubble burning.
